armSize.title: Arm size assessment
armSize.subtitle: Enter upper-arm circumference and body fat to calculate arm-size score (leaderboard only).

referenceInfo.title: Assessment references
referenceInfo.p1: Accepted ranges: upper-arm 1-70 cm and body fat 3-50%. Values outside range are blocked.
referenceInfo.p2: Formula: score = (arm / 50) × (1 + (20 - body-fat) / 100) × 100, rounded to 2 decimals.
referenceInfo.p3: This score is used for the arm-size leaderboard only, and is not part of the six-axis radar or Home overall.

armSize.capNoticeTitle: Leaderboard value capped by axis ceiling
armSize.capNoticeBody: When raw score exceeds the per-axis ceiling (200), leaderboard submission is stored as 200.
armSize.submitDone: Saved. Switch leaderboard metric to Arm size to view ranking.

errors.invalid-arm-cm: Enter a positive upper-arm circumference in cm.
errors.invalid-body-fat: Enter a valid body-fat percentage number.
errors.body-fat-out-of-range: Body fat must be between 3% and 50%.
